description: Greystar is a real estate company focused on rental housing, property management, development, and investment services. Its public website primarily serves property listings, corporate information, and business service information.
summary: Greystar exposes one known public integration surface: the unauthenticated Greystar Apartment Scout MCP server at https://apt-scout.greystar.com/mcp. No public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on greystar.com.
